step_by_step_reasoning: We identify two domains: Spot.io (SaaS provider) and Client. Onboarding begins with the client developer deploying a CloudFormation template to create a cross-account IAM role. Spot.io's EC2 data collectors use this role to gather infrastructure metrics from the Client's EKS cluster, storing 2 billion daily data points in Aurora. SageMaker analyzes this data to predict Spot interruptions. If an interruption is predicted, Spot.io's EKS-based controller leverages the cross-account IAM role to proactively replace Spot instances within the Client's EKS cluster.

graph.name: Spot.io Proactive Spot Instance Management
graph.notes: SaaS architecture leveraging SageMaker to predict Spot instance interruptions with 85% accuracy, automatically replacing client EKS worker nodes using cross-account IAM roles.

nodes.name: Spot.io SageMaker
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Machine learning models predicting interruptions 1 hour in advance.
